disciplines.name: Computer Science
disciplines.description: The study of computation, algorithms, data structures, and the design of software systems. Covers both theoretical foundations and practical software engineering.

disciplines.name: Software Engineering
disciplines.description: The systematic application of engineering principles to the design, development, testing, and maintenance of software.

disciplines.name: Data Science
disciplines.description: The interdisciplinary study of extracting knowledge and insights from structured and unstructured data using scientific methods, algorithms, and systems.

disciplines.name: Artificial Intelligence
disciplines.description: The study of intelligent agents — systems that perceive their environment and take actions to maximize chances of achieving goals.

disciplines.name: Mathematics
disciplines.description: The abstract science of number, quantity, and space. Foundational to all quantitative disciplines.

disciplines.name: Business Administration
disciplines.description: The management of business operations and decision-making, covering finance, marketing, strategy, organizational behavior, and operations.

disciplines.name: Finance
disciplines.description: The study of investments, money management, financial markets, and the valuation of assets.

disciplines.name: Marketing
disciplines.description: The study of creating, communicating, and delivering value to customers, including market research, branding, and digital strategy.

disciplines.name: Management
disciplines.description: The study of leading organizations, teams, and people — covering strategy, operations, human resources, and organizational behavior.

disciplines.name: Economics
disciplines.description: The study of scarcity, resource allocation, and decision-making at individual, firm, and societal levels.

disciplines.name: Information & Communication Technologies
disciplines.description: The broad field encompassing computer science, software engineering, data science, AI, networking, and cybersecurity.

disciplines.name: Business, Administration & Law
disciplines.description: The broad field encompassing business administration, finance, marketing, management, accounting, and commercial law.

disciplines.name: Psychology
disciplines.description: The scientific study of mind, brain, and behavior — encompassing cognition, development, social interaction, neuroscience, and mental health.

disciplines.name: Social Sciences
disciplines.description: The broad field encompassing economics, psychology, sociology, political science, and anthropology — studying human society and social relationships.

disciplines.name: Natural Sciences
disciplines.description: The broad field encompassing mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and earth sciences — studying the natural world through observation and experiment.
